title: SPORTSPET High Bounce Dog Balls Snowman Stack Edition, Rubber Dog Ball, Dog, Fun Fetch Toy for Dogs, Durable Dog Ball for Play, for Dogs, Pack of 3 (60mm)
features: Festive Snowman Design: These dog toy balls stack together to form a playful snowman, perfect for holiday fun.
High Bounce Performance: Engineered for a great bounce, these high bounce dog balls are ideal for games of fetch.
Winter-Ready Floating Fun: It may be too chilly for a swim, but these high bounce dog balls float perfectly for fetch games on land or near water!
Durable and Safe: Made from non-toxic materials, these rubber dog balls ensure safe and engaging play for your dog.
Versatile Play: Suitable for both indoor and outdoor fetch games, bringing festive fun wherever you go.
description: Bring fun to your dog’s playtime with the SPORTSPET High Bounce Snowman Stack 3pk! These festive dog balls stack together to form a cheerful snowman design, making them the perfect dog presents or gifts for dogs. Crafted with our signature high bounce performance, these rubber dog balls are perfect for fetch, offering hours of fun both indoors and outdoors. Made with durable, non-toxic materials, they’re designed to withstand active play. Whether in a dog stocking or under the tree, the Snowman Stack Edition is guaranteed to delight your furry friend. Remember, it’s for play, not snacking—real snowmen not included!
